title: Design System: Eastern State Strategic Plan

auth-display.purpose: Identity-panel statement only; never authenticated product UI.

micro.purpose: Badges and terse qualified states only.

report-caption.purpose: Print and export context only; never interactive controls.

report-title.purpose: The printed Board Report title only.

mono.purpose: Literal or aligned data values only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single dominant action in a light workflow region.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{min-height:44px;padding:12px 16px;border:0;border-radius:8px;background:var(--color-tertiary);color:#fff;font:700 14px/1.14 'Galano Grotesque',system-ui,sans-serif;letter-spacing:.02em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:scale var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out),background-color var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out),box-shadow var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out)}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:var(--color-ink);box-shadow:0 0 8px 3px rgba(0,33,48,.14)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--color-focus);outline-offset:2px}.ds-btn-primary:active{scale:.96}.ds-btn-primary:disabled{cursor:not-allowed;opacity:.45}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.ds-btn-primary{scale:1;transition-duration:var(--motion-fast)}}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A neutral alternative that never competes with the primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary{min-height:44px;padding:12px 16px;border:0;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;color:var(--color-ink);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,54,73,.14);font:700 14px/1.14 'Galano Grotesque',system-ui,sans-serif;letter-spacing:.02em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:scale var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out),background-color var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out),box-shadow var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out)}.ds-btn-secondary:hover{background:#eef3f4;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,54,73,.22)}.ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--color-focus);outline-offset:2px}.ds-btn-secondary:active{scale:.96}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.ds-btn-secondary{scale:1;transition-duration:var(--motion-fast)}}

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: A separated destructive action used with explicit confirmation.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: A labeled, 44-pixel field with visible hover, focus, disabled, and invalid states.
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:6px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);font:600 11px/1.4 'Galano Grotesque',system-ui,sans-serif;letter-spacing:.08em}.ds-field input{min-height:44px;padding:8px 12px;border:0;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:var(--color-ink);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-hairline-cool);font:400 16px/1.5 'Galano Grotesque',system-ui,sans-serif;transition:box-shadow var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out),background-color var(--motion-fast) var(--ease-out)}.ds-field input:hover{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px #a9c2c8}.ds-field input:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--color-focus);outline-offset:2px;box-shadow:inset 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1),inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-primary)}.ds-field input[aria-invalid=true]{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-danger-text)}

components.name: Active Navigation Link
components.description: The selected destination reverses the dark shell polarity without adding an accent color.
components.html: OverviewReports

components.name: Bounded Card
components.description: A card for one bounded object or workflow region, never a generic section wrapper.

components.name: Qualified Warning Badge
components.description: A soft repeated state that names its subject and does not consume the Sample-data yellow.

components.name: Progress
components.description: A left-anchored result whose accessible value updates immediately.

narrative.overview: This is an internal strategic-performance product, not a marketing site. Its design should disappear into review, reporting, data entry, and governance work while making the evidence behind every conclusion easy to inspect. Calm comes from predictable structure; confidence comes from qualified states, visible denominators, sources, Targets, and recovery—not decorative authority.
keyCharacteristics: One light product canvas with a dark navy navigation shell.
A restrained navy/teal identity; color communicates role and state, not decoration.
Bright yellow appears only on the Sample data disclosure.
Flat sections and divided rows are the default; cards mark truly bounded objects or workflow regions.
One dominant action per workflow region, with destructive actions separated and quieter until required.
Immediate route and filter changes; motion is limited to temporary layers, press feedback, and progress continuity.
Evidence, missingness, and recovery remain visible at every viewport.

rules.name: The Orientation Rule
rules.body: Location is communicated by breadcrumbs, headings, selected controls, URL state, skeleton geometry, and focus—not page theater.

rules.name: The Sample Data Rule
rules.body: The sample-accent token is the only bright-yellow treatment and always names Sample data.

rules.name: The Qualified State Rule
rules.body: Color never carries meaning alone. Every visible state names its subject; the generic label Status is prohibited.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: Authenticated screens use a compact fixed scale; fluid display type is reserved for authentication identity panels.

rules.name: The Bounded Object Rule
rules.body: A card is justified only when content behaves as one object or workflow region. A card inside a card is a defect.

rules.name: The Single Depth Rule
rules.body: Do not pair a decorative one-pixel border with a wide soft shadow.

dos: Do preserve exactly four destinations and the supporting Priority and Measure drill-down hierarchy.
Do use Measure and Strategic Priority in product copy and qualify every state label.
Do keep Reporting Period, comparison basis, Targets, denominators, sources, completeness, and caveats visible where they support a decision.
Do keep Overview bounded and Reports the exclusive owner of Board Report, Trends, CSV, PNG, PDF, and print.
Do use strategic observations as the sole current reporting truth and keep saves atomic and server-confirmed.
Do reserve bright yellow for Sample data; use the softer semantic warning treatment everywhere else.
Do route new UI through src/components/ui/, semantic tokens, and the existing motion/focus contracts.
Do verify long content, 320–1920px viewports, 200%–400% zoom, keyboard operation, reduced motion, print, and browser console behavior.
Do keep missing, partial, stale, offline, unavailable, saving, failure, and conflict states explicit and recoverable.
donts: Don't turn the product into a generic SaaS dashboard, marketing site, scorecard, or ornamental data visualization.
Don't add a fifth destination, a hidden Board Report surface, a second export owner, or a parallel reporting truth.

Don't add nested-card grids, redundant containers, decorative glass, arbitrary gradients, side-stripe alerts, gradient text, decorative grid or stripe backgrounds, excessive pills, or hero-metric templates.
Don't use generic Status, Category, Metric, KPI, entry, or Configuration Gap as unqualified product labels.
Don't introduce theatrical route entrances, staggered dashboard motion, blur reveals, bounce, elastic easing, or animation of layout properties.
Don't fake save, export, download, print, offline-sync, or conflict completion.
Don't hide Targets, definitions, Reporting Periods, comparison basis, sources, missingness, status qualification, report ownership, or conflict and offline truth in the name of simplicity.
Don't use yellow for warnings, buttons, charts, progress, or decoration; its scarcity as the Sample-data signal is the point.
Don't shrink touch targets, mute body text below contrast requirements, truncate meaningful long names, or rely on color alone.
Don't change the 120/180/220ms motion vocabulary without a measured, documented defect and focused verification.
